title: Chandu on the Magic Island
writer: Barry Barringer, Harry A. Earnshaw, Vera M. Oldham
actors: Bela Lugosi, Maria Alba, Clara Kimball Young
plot: On the mystic island of Lemuria, the cult of Ubasti seek the Egyptian Princess Nadji to sacrifice so that their goddess Ossana, whose soul resides in Nadji's body, may be resurrected by Black Magic.
